headline: MAGA рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹҚҠ Split on Iran BBQ рҹ”ҘрҹҮ®рҹҮ· 'WTF We Do This?' рҹҳ©рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷӮпёҸ
text:
TEN DAYS вҸ°рҹ’Ҙ since TRUMP рҹҚҠрҹҰ… Daddy dropped the IRAN BOMB рҹ’ЈрҹҮ®рҹҮ· on those ayatollah simps рҹ•ҢрҹҳӨ, AMERIFATS рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹҚ” from coast to coast SPILLING TEA вҳ• to BBC рҹ‘“рҹ“ә on 'WHAT TF IS THE WIN рҹҸҶ HERE?!' Wall-to-wall DIVISION рҹӨјвҖҚвҷӮпёҸрҹ’” вҖ“ half the red hats рҹ§ўрҹ”ҙ screaming 'NUKE EM LOW ENERGY рҹҡҖвҳўпёҸ' while blue check soy boys рҹҘўрҹҳӯ whine 'WHY WE EVEN BEEFING рҹҘҠ WITH PERSIAN DADDIES рҹҗӘрҹ‘івҖҚвҷӮпёҸ?' Trump announced the smackdown like 'HOLD MY BIG MAC рҹҚ”рҹ‘Ҡ' but normies SHRUGGING рҹӨ·вҖҚвҷҖпёҸрҹҳө вҖ“ 'I DON'T KNOW WHY WE'RE DOING IT' vibes hitting HARDER than Epstein's island guest list рҹҚҶрҹӣ©пёҸ! 

Rust Belt Chad рҹ§”рҹҸӯрҹ’Ә in Ohio: 'BLOW EM TO ALLAH-SNACKS рҹҢ®рҹ’Ё вҖ“ make gas CHEAP AF вӣҪрҹӨ‘ so I can VROOM my F-150 рҹҡҖ!' Cali Karen рҹ’…рҹҢҙрҹҳұ counters: 'PEACE NOW вңҢпёҸрҹҢҲ or BIDEN'S GONNA CRY рҹҚјрҹ’§!' Black Twitter рҹ”Ҙрҹ“ұ erupting: 'TRUMP PLAYING 4D CHESS вҷҹпёҸрҹҮәрҹҮё vs. IRAN CHESS вҖ“ they got HOOKAH BOMBS рҹӘ”рҹ’Ј!' Meanwhile, Florida Man рҹҗҠрҹҳң just wants 'MORE BEER рҹҘӨрҹҮ®рҹҮ· fights on PPV рҹ“әрҹ’Ҙ!' 

BBC simps рҹӨЎрҹ“» asking 'BEST OUTCOME рҹҘҮ?' вҖ“ MAGA dreams of OIL ORGY вӣҪрҹҚ‘рҹ’Ұ flooding pumps, libs fantasizing 'DIPLOMACY HUGS рҹӨ—рҹ•ҠпёҸ' but deep down EVERYONE knows it's TRUMP'S ART OF THE DEAL рҹӨ‘рҹ“ҡ sequel: 'IRAN EDITION вҖ“ YOU'RE HIRED... OR FRIED рҹ”Ҙрҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹҚі!' Polls рҹ“ҠрҹҳӨ split 50/50 like a bad divorce рҹ’”вҡ–пёҸ вҖ“ Heartland heroes рҹҰёвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ yelling 'ENDLESS WAR WINS рҹҸ…' cuz 'MERICA рҹҮәрҹҮёрҹҰ…, snowflake cities вқ„пёҸрҹҢғ moaning 'BRING BOYS HOME рҹҸ рҹ‘ЁвҖҚвңҲпёҸ!' Pun alert: Iran's NUKES got that LOW ENRICHMENT VIBE рҹҳҸрҹ’° вҖ“ Trump said 'URANIUM DUMP рҹҡ®' and now we're all DIVIDED like a bad falafel split рҹҘҷрҹ’Ҙ! 

Vets рҹҳӨрҹҺ–пёҸ spitting facts: 'QUICK SMACK рҹ‘Ӣ then PEACE вҖ“ no FOREVER WARS рҹ”„рҹҳ© like Bush's sandbox party рҹҸңпёҸрҹҺү!' TikTok zoomers рҹ“ұрҹ•ә dancing on graves вҡ°пёҸрҹ’ғ: 'Iran who? Pass the avocado toast рҹҘ‘рҹҚһ!' Trump allies like MTG рҹ”ҘрҹҚ‘ raging 'STRIKE HARDER рҹҮ®рҹҮ·рҹ’Ҙ вҖ“ make Khamenei KNEEL рҹҷҸрҹҳӨ!' But normie uncles at BBQ рҹҚ–рҹ”Ҙ just grunting 'GAS PRICES DOWN OR RIOT вӣҪрҹҳЎ!' BBC wrapping it: AMERICANS DIVIDED AF рҹӨқвқҢ вҖ“ from 'BOMB BABY BOMBSHELL рҹ’Јрҹ‘¶' to 'WHY BOTHER рҹҘұ?' вҖ“ Trump stirring the POT рҹ«–рҹҮәрҹҮё like a boss while Iran's crying 'UNCLE SAM NOOOO рҹҮ®рҹҮ·рҹҳӯ!' Epic culture war CLASH вҡ”пёҸрҹ“ә вҖ“ who's simping for who? рҹҚҶрҹӨЎ
